situation: User asked to update CineWorkflow pricing cards to 3D neumorphic
what_i_did: Applied neumorphic styles to main buttons but missed the pricing cards
what_you_wanted: All pricing card buttons should be 3D neumorphic
how_we_fixed_it: Updated Pricing.jsx to apply 3D neumorphic styles with pressed effects to all plan buttons
root_cause: Didn't verify which specific buttons needed updating, assumed scope was smaller
prevention: When user says 'buttons on X', enumerate all button instances in that component

situation: User wanted to know what model I was using
what_i_did: Answered directly without checking if they wanted technical details
how_we_fixed_it: Provided concise answer with model name only
root_cause: Over-explained when user wanted minimal info
prevention: Match response detail to question specificity

situation: User wanted CameraMoveCards to match HTML page animations exactly
what_i_did: Recreated animations from scratch instead of copying exact logic
what_you_wanted: Exact copy of HTML page animations (SVGs, timing, values)
how_we_fixed_it: Created reusable components that directly port HTML animation logic
root_cause: Assumed 'implement' meant 'create new' rather than 'replicate exactly'
prevention: When user references existing implementation, ask: 'Copy exactly or adapt?'

situation: User said 'make it compact' for Uses section in PromptEnhancer
what_i_did: Made buttons smaller but kept category layout
what_you_wanted: Category headings above buttons, not inline
how_we_fixed_it: Restructured layout to stack headings vertically above button rows
prevention: Ask for visual layout clarification when restructuring UI

situation: User said 'tell me what you understood' before I executed changes
what_i_did: Immediately executed changes without confirming understanding first
how_we_fixed_it: Stopped execution, explained what I understood, waited for confirmation
root_cause: Jumped to action when user explicitly asked for verification step
prevention: When user says 'tell me what you understood' or similar, pause and confirm before acting
